resources.string: The Eiffel Tower is a 300-meter landmark in Paris and one of the most famous structures in the world.
The Kaaba is the holiest site in Islam located in Mecca, serving as the direction of prayer for Muslims.
The Leaning Tower of Pisa is a famous tilted bell tower in Italy.
The Great Wall of China is a massive ancient defensive structure stretching across northern China.
The Colosseum is an ancient Roman amphitheater used for gladiator battles.
The Taj Mahal is a white marble mausoleum in India symbolizing eternal love.
